creator: brett@peloton.physics.montana.edu
text:
I talked to the original submitter and suggested that it may have failed
due to his X process running in > 8 bpp (which will cause xgrabsc to fail
in the way he described).  He said this was true and said he would submit
a followup, but he hasn't. 

I think we can close this.

Brett
